title: EventEnvelope
description: Generic wrapper for all events published to Service Bus. Every message carries a correlation ID for distributed tracing and a typed payload.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance

traceId.description: OpenTelemetry trace ID for distributed tracing

correlationId.description: Correlation ID linking related events (typically the planId)

source.description: Service that emitted the event (e.g. orchestrator, be-worker)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of event creation
